name: GitLab API
description:
An OpenAPI definition for the GitLab REST API.
Few API resources or endpoints are currently included.
The intent is to expand this to match the entire Markdown documentation of the API:
<https://docs.gitlab.com/api/>. Contributions are welcome.

When viewing this on gitlab.com, you can test API calls directly from the browser
against the `gitlab.com` instance, if you are logged in.
The feature uses the current [GitLab session cookie](https://docs.gitlab.

capabilities.name: badges
capabilities.description: Manage badges — adds a badge to a group, adds a badge to a project, updates a badge of a group. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: access_requests
capabilities.description: Manage access requests — requests access for the authenticated user to a group, requests access for the authenticated user to a project, approves an access request for the given user. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: branches
capabilities.description: Manage branches — create branch, unprotect a single branch, protect a single branch. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: alert_management
capabilities.description: Manage alert management — upload a metric image for an alert, workhorse authorize metric image file upload, update a metric image for an alert. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: batched_background_migrations
capabilities.description: Manage batched background migrations — resume a batched background migration, pause a batched background migration, get the list of batched background migrations. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: pipeline_composition
capabilities.description: Manage pipeline composition — create a new instance-level variable, update an instance-level variable, list all instance-level variables. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: admin
capabilities.description: Manage admin — retrieve dictionary details. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: clusters
capabilities.description: Manage clusters — add existing instance cluster, edit instance cluster, list instance clusters. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: migrations
capabilities.description: Manage migrations — mark the migration as successfully executed. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: applications
capabilities.description: Manage applications — create a new application, get applications, delete an application. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: avatar
capabilities.description: Manage avatar — return avatar url for a user. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: broadcast_messages
capabilities.description: Manage broadcast messages — create a broadcast message, update a broadcast message, get all broadcast messages. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
